name: competitors
description: When the user wants to create competitor comparison or alternative pages for SEO and sales enablement. Also use when the user mentions 'alternative page,' 'vs page,' 'competitor comparison,' 'comparison page,' '[Product] vs [Product],' '[Product] alternative,' 'competitive landing pages,' 'how do we compare to X,' 'battle card,' or 'competitor teardown.' Use this for any content that positions your product against competitors. Covers four formats: singular alternative, plural alternatives, you v
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 专用于生成竞品对比和替代品落地页的工具，帮你快速产出“A vs B”或竞品拆解页面，适合用于SEO优化和销售转化，轻松凸显自家产品优势。
